message:
perf(canvas): add bounds-checked point_colored_in_bounds for tight inner loops

Adds Painter::point_colored_in_bounds(x: usize, y: usize, color) that
skips the i32 conversion and bounds checking in the hot path of plasma
and metaball rendering. The caller is responsible for ensuring coordinates
are within bounds (enforced by debug_assert).

Plasma and metaball canvas adapters updated to use the new method since
their iteration bounds already guarantee valid coordinates, eliminating
redundant per-pixel bounds checks in these O(width*height) loops.

Includes unit test for the new method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
